---

## Description {#description}

Contains active roles of a current user. `SET ROLE` changes the contents of this table.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `role_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Role name.
- `with_admin_option` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — 1 if the role has ADMIN OPTION privilege.
- `is_default` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — 1 if role is set to be a default.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
